value.found_quote: Agent observability refers to the methods for gaining insights into the internal state and behavior of software agents, particularly AI-powered agents such as those built using Large Language Models (LLMs).
value.rationale: The page is Google Cloud's official documentation on agent observability, describing both agent observability and evaluation (via the Gen AI evaluation service and Application Monitoring). It matches the claim's description nearly verbatim, including the points about agents drifting, hallucinating, regressing, and failing differently from non-agentic software. The offering is presented as currently available.
